rows.label: tev060901_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Lularita if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev060901_MSG1001
rows.name:
Even Lularita, greatest warrior of
caravan, has troubles to deal with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG1002
rows.name:
But Lularita hear that city of
friend has really wonderful person
who helps solve any problem![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG1003
rows.name:
If Lularita ever get close
to end of wits, Lularita plan
to go ask for assistance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG1004
rows.name:
...Person's name? Um, was
it Hype? Harp? Hoop?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Lularita about caravan defenses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Lularita if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Lularita about enemies in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Drongo Caravan is safer than most with
super tough gal like Lularita around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Other caravans have own tricks
for staving off danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0003
rows.name:
For example, Lularita hear they
spread aprica poop around perimeter
to keep smaller critters away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0004
rows.name:
What Lularita want to know is how
they can LIVE in dungheap like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Every Nopon was talking about girl named
Himeri who will listen to any problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Friend should tell Himeri that
Lularita will be back soon, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh, and also that Lularita
want help for free.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Want to know secret training place
of Lularita? Place is what turn
Lularita into super fighting machine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0025
rows.name:
Just find bad guys hanging out on outer
wall when friend climb out of ocean. It
feel so good to just wail away on them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Mo? What does friend mean, "weak"?
It took long time for Lularita to
get strong enough to beat them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Lularita about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Lularita about enemies in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0021
rows.name:
Does it make Himeri happy
when people rely on her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0022
rows.name:
In that case, Lularita will let
Himeri listen to ALL worries
of Lularita free of charge![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0023
rows.name: ...Just kidding. Lularita will pay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0024
rows.name:
As long as payment can be in snuggle time
with adorable Lularita! Himeri should be
thankful for such luxurious compensation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0027
rows.name:
There is huuuuuuge battleship that keeps
lookout from sky all day and night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0028
rows.name:
Anything that try to fly in front of it
is blasted right out of air. Pyoo pyoo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0029
rows.name:
Smart thing for friend to do while
exploring this continent is stay on foot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060901_MSG0030
rows.name:
They not watching the ground, or
else Lularita and friends would
have been shot to bits already.[ST:wait ]
